rationale: Educ. Code §31.022 governs State Board of Education review and approval of instructional materials. It has no connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The State Board of Education shall review instructional materials provided to the board by the agency under Section 31.023.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this instructional materials statute.
